title: Event
description: Formal schema for an event per D10 (event kind) + D23 (work-unit-id slot addition). Events form the workspace's single ordered chain of attribution-bearing happenings (D10). This schema validates the event envelope; per-payload-subtype payload schemas are layer-3 follow-on (core subtypes' payload shapes documented in D10; extension-registered subtypes' payloads validated by their declaring extension per D29). Notation: JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 per D28. Layer-3 formal schema per D11. Cross-kind referential integrity (e.g., that actors[].id resolves in workspace.composition.actors; that work-unit-id resolves) is out of scope per D28.

prev-event.description: Reference to the prior event in the workspace's chain (D10). null only for the workspace's first event ever.

timestamp.description: When the event happened (D10). ISO-8601 UTC.

actors.description: At least one actor reference per D10 + D9. Role-tag vocabulary is shape policy, not part of the event kind.

role.description: Optional shape-declared role-tag (e.g., drafter, attester, reviewer).

payload-subtype.description: Either a core payload-subtype (D10: claim, action, state-change, composition-change, lifecycle-transition) or a fully-qualified extension-registered subtype per D29.

payload.description: Subtype-specific structure (D10). Framework-core validates the five core subtypes' payload shapes (per-subtype schemas = layer-3 follow-on); extension-declared subtypes are validated by their declaring extension per D29.

work-unit-id.description: Optional reference to the work-unit (D20) the event is associated with (D23 added this slot). null when the event is not work-unit-associated (e.g., workspace-level lifecycle events).
